RefreshRuntimeTokenInternal gets an access token for the consumer service account that the customer
attached to the runtime. Only accessible from the tenant instance.

snippets.description: ResetRuntime resets a Managed Notebook Runtime.
snippets.title: notebooks ResetRuntime Sample

snippets.description:
SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces
any existing policy.

Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED`
errors.
snippets.title: notebooks SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description:
StartRuntime starts a Managed Notebook Runtime.
Perform "Start" on GPU instances; "Resume" on CPU instances
See: 
https: //cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/stop-start-instance
https: //cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/suspend-resume-instance
snippets.title: notebooks StartRuntime Sample

snippets.description:
StopRuntime stops a Managed Notebook Runtime.
Perform "Stop" on GPU instances; "Suspend" on CPU instances
See: 
https: //cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/stop-start-instance
https: //cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/suspend-resume-instance
snippets.title: notebooks StopRuntime Sample

snippets.description: SwitchRuntime switch a Managed Notebook Runtime.
snippets.title: notebooks SwitchRuntime Sample

snippets.description:
TestIamPermissions returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the
resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of
permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error.

Note: This operation is designed to be used for building
permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization
checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
snippets.title: notebooks TestIamPermissions Sample

snippets.description: UpdateRuntime update Notebook Runtime configuration.
snippets.title: notebooks UpdateRuntime Sample

snippets.description: UpgradeRuntime upgrades a Managed Notebook Runtime to the latest version.
snippets.title: notebooks UpgradeRuntime Sample

snippets.description:
RegisterInstance registers an existing legacy notebook instance to the Notebooks API server.
Legacy instances are instances created with the legacy Compute Engine
calls. They are not manageable by the Notebooks API out of the box. This
call makes these instances manageable by the Notebooks API.
snippets.title: notebooks RegisterInstance Sample

snippets.description:
ReportInstanceInfo allows notebook instances to
report their latest instance information to the Notebooks
API server. The server will merge the reported information to
the instance metadata store. Do not use this method directly.
snippets.title: notebooks ReportInstanceInfo Sample

snippets.description: ResetInstance resets a notebook instance.
snippets.title: notebooks ResetInstance Sample

snippets.description: RollbackInstance rollbacks a notebook instance to the previous version.
